name: Capability summary — POST /api/skill/capabilities (offline, no LLM)
description: First real HTTP-scenario regression test (docs/new/csimple-agent-prompt.md §5.5): exercises /api/skill/capabilities end-to-end against a real in-process Express server (see eval/http-app.js), fully offline/deterministic — no LLM or network calls. Asserts the summary lists a shell command and flags the declared/actual category mismatch (skill declares only safe-read but its steps resolve to shell + sandboxed-write).
